TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Beinan Nsgan Beinan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 425.47 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 286.16 km², dxgal pmblxan o 14.77 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 6,234, sapah o 1,820, seejiq tnpusu 4,072 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 65%(Puyuma, Sbnawan, Rukay). Puyuma, Sbnawan, Rukay ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Beinan o niqan 13 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Ulivelivek , A'lripay , Likavung , Pinaski , Kalito'od , Fudafudak , Dikidiki , Taromak , Tamalakaw , Danadanaw . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: bəinan nsgan bəinan o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(pujuma, sbnawan, ɾukaj). pujuma, sbnawan, ɾukaj ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan bəinan o niqan ** alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, uli*əli*ək , a'lɾipaj , lika*uŋ , pinaski , kalito'od , *uda*udak , dikidiki , taɾomak , tamalakaw , danadanaw . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Beinan Nsgan Beinan o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 425.47 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 286.16 km², dxgal pmblxan o 14.77 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 6,234, sapah o 1,820, seejiq tnpusu 4,072 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 65%(Puyuma, Sbnawan, Rukay). Puyuma, Sbnawan, Rukay ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Beinan o niqan 13 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Ulivelivek , A'lripay , Likavung , Pinaski , Kalito'od , Fudafudak , Dikidiki , Taromak , Tamalakaw , Danadanaw . pusupnyahan patas
